transcription.text: Helping your kids get fewer cavities can take enthusiasm, or just Act Kids Scooby-Doo Rinse. It tastes great and helps reduce cavities up to 40%, so it's all good. Act Kids. And for kids with braces, try our new Act Braces Care Mouthwash.

segments.text: Helping your kids get fewer cavities can take enthusiasm, or just Act Kids Scooby-Doo Rinse.
It tastes great and helps reduce cavities up to 40%, so it's all good. Act Kids.
